pages.text: $(8)Clans are a way to join your friends and your clanmates together. When you register a clan, a unique instance will be created in the server, this will allow your friends and you to be in the same clan. $(br2)All of your friends and your tamed Wild Cats will automatically be added to the clan as well, and they will become allies, which will avoid hurting or attacking each other by mistake.$(br)
pages.title: Clans System

pages.text: $(8)When you have registered a clan, every important event will automatically be register in the clan's logs, or you can even write logs of your own! $(br2) - Clan Ranks: $(br)Clan ranks are merely a roleplay resource for now. However, this will most likely be expanded in the future. There can only be one leader, one deputy, two medicine cats, and one medicine apprentice.$(br)
pages.title: Clans System

pages.text: $(8)Clan Staff ranks are the functional part of it.$(br2)A Guest will not have any perms but wont get attacked by cats from their clan either. Perfect if you simply want to avoid your friends getting hurt!$(br2)A member will have the perms listed before but will also be able to take other cats from their clan. This means they can command them to follow, stay, or wander, and change anything about them.$(br)
pages.title: Clans Staff

pages.text: $(8)Admin has the perms listed before and the ability to make other players members or guests as well as the ability to register logs for their clan. Admins are trusted and in charge of keeping things organized.$(br2)The owner has all the perms listed before and the ability to choose admins for their clan.$(br)
pages.title: Clans Staff

pages.text: $(8)/wce clan register$(br)/wce clan list$(br)/wce clan manage$(br)/wce clan invite$(br)/wce clan kick$(br)/wce clan leave$(br)/wce clan setnewleader$(br)/wce clan disband$(br)/wce clan changeperms$(br)/wce clan changerole(br)
pages.title: Commands
